quotes.text: A good programmer is someone who always looks both ways before crossing a one-way street. Then copies the answer from Stack Overflow anyway.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: My development process: 1) Google the error 2) Find a Stack Overflow answer from 2014 3) It works 4) I have no idea why
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Genius is 1% inspiration, 99% finding a Stack Overflow answer that's only slightly wrong.
quotes.author: Unknown
